title: The $3,011 Tax Refund Trap Nobody Warns You About
hook: The IRS just sent you $3,011 — and statistically, you're about to waste every dollar of it.
angle: Your tax refund isn't free money — it's an interest-free loan you gave the government all year. Then you blow it impulsively instead of investing it.
audience: Working adults who get a tax refund every spring and feel good about it
